pages.text: $(l)Identity$()$(br2)The Knocker feels close before the player fully understands what is happening. It turns warning sounds into fear.$(br2)$(l)Impression$()$(br2)Hearing it can already mean the danger has started.

pages.title: Behavior
pages.text: $(l)Atmosphere$()$(br2)This entity works best when the player has to listen carefully.$(br2)$(l)Fear Style$()$(br2)Its horror comes from waiting for the next sound.
